name: JoAi: Create User

description.en: Create a new user account with a personal team. Returns the user's id for use in subsequent steps.

bot: Use this when you need to create a new user account on behalf of an admin. The verified flag marks the email as verified immediately, skipping the email confirmation flow.

inputs.name: Email

description.en: The email address for the new user

inputs.bot: The user's email address. If a user with this email already exists, the existing user is returned.

inputs.name: Verified

description.en: Mark email as verified (skips email confirmation)

inputs.bot: Set to true to skip email verification for admin-created accounts. Requires admin token.
